meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup to Debug Faster
content.seo_description: Learn to master Claude Code skills setup to conquer debugging bottlenecks. A beginner-level case study for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop wasting hours manually tracing stack traces. By integrating Claude Code with your development workflow, you empower an AI agent to read your entire codebase, identify root causes, and suggest surgical fixes. This setup transforms debugging from a tedious manual chore into an automated, high-speed validation process for your client projects.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client’s production environment is throwing cryptic 500 errors, and your coffee has gone cold. You’ve spent three hours chasing a ghost in the codebase, and the deadline is looming. This is the 'debugging wall'—the single biggest profit-killer for freelance developers.

But what if you didn't have to hunt for errors alone? By leveraging Claude Code, you turn your CLI into a high-octane pair-programming engine. This guide shows you how to bridge the gap between messy code and clean, deployable solutions, ensuring you deliver faster and maintain your sanity.

steps.title: Initialize Claude Code in Your Repository
steps.description: Establish a secure connection between your local environment and Claude’s reasoning engine to allow deep codebase context awareness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the directory structure and identify the primary entry points for this project to prepare for debugging.

steps.title: Define the Debugging Scope
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scan specific modules that are causing runtime exceptions, ensuring the AI focuses only on relevant logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify the logic flow in the authentication controller that leads to the current runtime error.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review the auth controller logs and trace the execution path for the null pointer exception.'

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Let the AI perform a differential analysis between your code and standard best practices to pinpoint the architectural flaw.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Compare the current implementation of the database query against optimized patterns to find the bottleneck.
steps.claude_code_command: claude fix 'Analyze the performance lag in the DB query and suggest an optimized implementation.'

steps.title: Apply Surgical Code Fixes
steps.description: Generate and review patches directly through the CLI, maintaining full control while automating the tedious syntax work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a patch that resolves the dependency conflict while maintaining backward compatibility with existing features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'Apply the proposed fix to the user module and ensure all imports are resolved.'

steps.title: Validate with Automated Regression Tests
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't break existing functionality by running your test suite via the AI assistant.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of edge-case tests to verify that the fix handles null inputs gracefully.

pro_tips: Always use the 'ask' command to force Claude to explain its reasoning before applying a fix; this prevents hallucinated architectural changes.
Keep your .claudeignore file updated to prevent the AI from wasting tokens on node_modules or massive auto-generated assets.
Use Claude Code in 'chat' mode to brainstorm refactoring strategies before you actually commit any file changes.
Link your Antigravity project environment variables to Claude Code to ensure the AI understands your specific production context.
When debugging intermittent bugs, provide the specific error logs as a text file to the CLI to avoid context window truncation.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your first module, begin mapping your entire project architecture using Antigravity to enable Claude Code to perform full-system refactoring tasks.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start mastering your craft. By automating the mundane, you reclaim the time to build higher-value features for your clients. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
